title: Transport Plus
summary: Professional Driver & Fleet Management Application. Transport Plus is a high-performance Flutter SAAS for logistics, offering full-lifecycle trip management including real-time job allocation, flight tracking, and automated financial reconciliation. Its multi-tenant architecture allows for dynamic white-labeling and seamless adaptation to diverse service provider backends.

content.heading: Project Overview
paragraphs: Transport Plus is a mission-critical Flutter SAAS solution designed to streamline complex logistics for professional drivers and fleet operators. By integrating real-time API layers for flight data, passenger metrics, and multi-stop routing, the app provides drivers with precise, up-to-the-minute job details. This ensures a seamless operational flow for everything from airport transfers to large-scale group bookings across both iOS and Android.

Technically, the platform maintains high-performance stability using a hybrid GetX and BLoC architecture to manage complex trip synchronization and financial reconciliation. Supported by Firebase for secure data persistence and white-labeling, the app reduces administrative overhead while providing a resilient, scalable interface for diverse transport providers.

process.title: Architecture & State Management
process.description: Established a scalable foundation using a hybrid architecture with GetX and BLoC to separate UI logic from complex business rules such as reconciliation and trip workflows.

process.title: Dynamic Tenant Configuration
process.description: Engineered a flexible startup flow that allows the app to dynamically resolve API endpoints and company-specific resources (COMPANYURL) directly from secure local storage.

process.title: Tracking & Service Integration
process.description: Integrated background geolocation for persistent fleet monitoring and implemented specialized flight tracking models to handle real-time arrival and departure updates for airport jobs.

process.title: Feature Delivery
process.description: Shipped a comprehensive suite of features including an automated 'Recon' module for financial settlements, a shift-based roster system, and a robust push notification layer using Firebase.

toolsDescription: To ensure 99.9% uptime for trips, we utilized Flutter for cross-platform consistency. The stack focuses on resilient state management with BLoC and GetX, combined with real-time Firebase services for live fleet tracking and instant trip management.

title: Localway – Local Experiences & Events Platform
summary: Localway is a full-featured Angular web application that connects users with local experiences and events in Malta and Gozo. The platform offers real-time filtering, multi-language support, category browsing, wishlist management, a booking flow with cart and pass-types, and an interactive map-based location layer.

content.heading: Project Overview
paragraphs: Localway is a consumer-facing discovery platform built entirely with Angular 20 standalone components and Angular Signals for reactive state management. It lets users browse, search, filter, and book local experiences and events.

The app communicates with a RESTful backend (via HttpClient), supports paginated experience listings, geolocation-based results, and a rich detail view per experience — complete with itinerary, FAQs, pass-types, and media galleries.

Internationalisation is baked in at the data-model level: every piece of user-facing text (titles, descriptions, category names) is stored as a LocalizedString array and resolved at render-time through a dedicated LanguageService, with English and Italian as supported languages.

process.title: Architecture & Routing
process.description: Defined a clean route hierarchy covering home, category explore, experience detail, bookings, wishlist, cart, profile (auth-guarded), and a full set of static pages (About, Contact, Blog, Legal, etc.).

process.title: Data Modelling
process.description: Designed TypeScript interfaces for more Experience, EventResponse, Category, PassType, Occurrence, and geospatial types (GeoJSONPoint, Location) to strictly type all API responses.

process.title: Reactive Services
process.description: Built signal-based services (ExperienceService,b CategoryService) that expose computed filtered lists, combined search results across experiences and locations, and date-range filtering — all derived automatically from a handful of source signals.

process.title: Feature Delivery
process.description: Shipped a full booking flow (cart → pass-type selection → checkout), wishlist, authentication modal, role-based route guard, media upload, and a shared component library including modals, breadcrumbs, labels, and a time-picker.

toolsDescription: For Localway, I prioritized a reactive architecture using Angular's latest features to ensure high performance and a seamless user experience across the Mediterranean's leading experience platform.

title: Freehour
summary: The ultimate student productivity platform. Freehour is a comprehensive web application offering timetable management, attendance tracking, and social scheduling. Its unique 'Who's Free' feature allows students to cross-reference schedules and find common free slots with friends in real-time.

content.heading: Project Overview
paragraphs: Freehour is a feature-rich student productivity and social platform designed to simplify academic life. Built entirely in Angular, it gives students a centralized dashboard to manage their university or college timetables, track lectures and attendance, and monitor essential deadlines like assignments and exams through custom countdowns.

A core differentiator of the platform is its social integration, specifically the 'Who's Free' feature. By leveraging a complex scheduling algorithm, the app allows users to seamlessly compare their timetables with peers, automatically highlighting mutual free gaps. This transforms a strictly utility-driven app into a collaborative campus tool, backed by resilient architecture and Firebase real-time data synchronization.

process.title: Architecture & State Management
process.description: Established a robust component-based architecture using Angular and RxJS to efficiently manage local state, complex calendar rendering, and asynchronous data streams.

process.title: Timetable & Calendar Engineering
process.description: Developed dynamic timetable interfaces that parse complex recurring rules, calculate lecture gaps, and seamlessly integrate cross-referenced scheduling logic.

process.title: Social Scheduling Algorithm
process.description: Implemented the 'Who's Free' algorithm, comparing user lecture endpoints and friends' schedules to precisely identify and display mutual free slots during the day.

process.title: Real-time Tracking & Features
process.description: Integrated complete student toolsets including attendance tracking, modular countdowns for assignments, and profile configurations, persisting data securely with Firebase.

toolsDescription: To guarantee smooth performance across a wide range of devices, we utilized Angular's reactive paradigms. The web app integrates heavily with RxJS for handling real-time friend states and complex timetable stream logic, paired with Firebase for reliable cloud synchronization.

title: Smart Inventory & POS System
summary: Full-featured Inventory Management and Point-of-Sale (POS) application built with Flutter. It streamlines product management, sales processing via QR code scanning, dynamic PDF receipt generation, and Bluetooth thermal printing. The app features robust analytics using Syncfusion Charts and ensures secure offline-first functionality utilizing SQLite, backed by Firebase for seamless cloud synchronization.

content.heading: Project Overview
paragraphs: The Smart Inventory & POS System is an all-in-one mobile app designed to optimize retail and warehouse operations. It empowers users with real-time store monitoring and frictionless daily sales by providing an intuitive user interface for managing a product catalog, adjusting quantities, and ringing up customers directly from a mobile device.

Technically, the platform operates on a robust offline-first architecture using SQLite, ensuring zero downtime during sales. It incorporates state management utilizing Provider to handle complex cart logic and data synchronization. The complete sales lifecycle is covered, including rapid item lookups via QR code scanning, instant Bluetooth thermal invoice (facture) printing, and comprehensive business reporting populated by visually rich Syncfusion charts.

process.title: Architecture & State Management
process.description: Established an offline-first foundation with SQLite for secure local persistence and rapid inventory adjustments, coupled with Provider for scalable state management across screens.

process.title: POS & Sales Integration
process.description: Implemented a high-fidelity point-of-sale workflow, introducing rapid QR code scanning for product lookup and dynamic cart processing within the centralized Cash and Sales screens.

process.title: Hardware Interactions
process.description: Engineered custom utility bridges to enable immediate remote Bluetooth thermal receipt printing, as well as robust dynamic PDF generation for invoices using the local file system.

process.title: Analytics & Cloud Sync
process.description: Integrated rich analytical dashboards incorporating Syncfusion charts for advanced sales and inventory reporting. Configured Firebase to handle secure cloud storage, optional remote database backups, and push notifications.

toolsDescription: To guarantee lightning-fast operations at the checkout counter, the application relies on an efficient local SQLite database. Flutter provided the ideal cross-platform framework to smoothly integrate hardware functionalities, such as the device camera for fast barcode scanning and Bluetooth peripherals for instant physical receipt printing.
